summary: Backend testing complete for Milestones System with QR ticket rewards. All 22 tests passed (21 passed, 1 skipped - VIP Status already claimed). Tested: GET milestones, claim milestones, get tickets, use tickets by ID, validate tickets by QR code, and missions API.
critical_code_review_comments: Milestones system correctly implements one-use QR tickets that are permanently deleted after validation
All 6 milestones have correct points_required values: Newbie(0), Rising Star(500), VIP Status(1000), Luna Elite(5000), Supernova(10000), Legend(25000)

Reward summaries match user spec: Rising Star(5 Drinks), VIP Status(10 Drinks + 4 Entries), Luna Elite(VIP Booth + 20 Drinks + 5 Entries), Supernova(VIP Booth + 30 Drinks + 5 Entries + 5 Express Entries + DJ Shoutout), Legend(Gold Status + Booth + Bottle + 50 Drinks + 10 Giftable Entries)
Missions API returns 7 missions from Lovable dashboard sync
seed_data_creation: During testing, claimed Supernova milestone (42 tickets generated). Used 3 tickets during validation tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Test user luna@test.com now has 80 active tickets across 4 milestones: Rising Star(4), VIP Status(12), Luna Elite(23), Supernova(41). Legend milestone (25000 pts) is still unclaimed as user has 22114 points. The validate-qr endpoint permanently deletes tickets after use and logs to milestone_ticket_usage collection. QR codes are in format LUNA-TKT-{ID_PREFIX}-{HMAC_SUFFIX}.

milestones: GET /api/milestones (PASS) - Returns all 6 milestones with user progress, unlocked/claimed status, active_tickets count
GET /api/milestones (PASS) - Correct reward_summary strings matching user spec
claim_milestone: POST /api/milestones/claim/legend (PASS) - Returns 'Need 25000 points. You have 22114.' error
POST /api/milestones/claim/supernova (PASS) - Generated 42 tickets (VIP Booth + 30 Drinks + 5 Entries + 5 Express + DJ Shoutout)
tickets: GET /api/milestones/tickets (PASS) - Returns all active tickets for user
GET /api/milestones/tickets?milestone_id=luna_elite (PASS) - Returns tickets filtered by milestone
ticket_validation: POST /api/milestones/tickets/{ticket_id}/use (PASS) - Staff uses ticket, permanently deleted
POST /api/milestones/tickets/validate-qr (PASS) - Staff validates by QR code, permanently deleted
POST /api/milestones/tickets/validate-qr (PASS) - Returns 404 for invalid QR code
missions: GET /api/missions (PASS) - Returns 7 missions from Lovable dashboard
integration: Full flow (PASS) - Check milestones → Claim Supernova → Get 42 tickets → Use ticket via staff
